summary: Complete testing of PASSWORD RESET LINK flow (token-based). All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The flow changed from code-based to link-based: forgot-password creates reset_token (UUID) in DB, email sends link to /aterstall-losenord?token=XXX, reset-password accepts {token, new_password}.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (3/min) can cause test failures if run too quickly. This is expected security behavior.
Fixed bug: data.get('token', '').strip() failed when token was None. Changed to (data.get('token') or '').strip()

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing are cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset LINK flow fully tested. Key behaviors verified: 1) POST /api/auth/forgot-password creates reset_token (UUID) in user_password_resets collection, 2) Same success message returned for both existing and non-existing emails (security), 3) POST /api/auth/reset-password accepts {token, new_password}, 4) Password validation enforced (min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char), 5) Used tokens cannot be reused, 6) Login with new password works, login with old password fails after reset.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/auth/forgot-password (register: ✓ Returns success, creates reset_token in DB
backend_api_tests.POST /api/auth/reset-password (valid tok: ✓ Changes password, marks token as used
backend_api_tests.Used token cannot be reused: ✓ Second reset with same token returns 400

frontend_ui_tests./logga-in page elements: ✓ Email input, password input, 'Logga in' button, 'Glömt lösenord?' link
frontend_ui_tests.forgot password form: ✓ Email input, 'Skicka återställningslänk' button, 'Tillbaka till inloggning' link
frontend_ui_tests.email sent confirmation: ✓ 'Återställningslänk skickad!' message with email displayed, 30 min validity note
frontend_ui_tests./aterstall-losenord (no token): ✓ 'Ogiltig länk' error page with 'Tillbaka till inloggning' button
frontend_ui_tests./aterstall-losenord?token=xxx (valid tok: ✓ 'Välj nytt lösenord' form with password fields and 'Ändra lösenord' button
frontend_ui_tests.after successful reset: ✓ 'Lösenordet har ändrats!' success page with 'Logga in' button

verified_features.forgot_password_link: ✓ 'Glömt lösenord?' link visible on login page
verified_features.password_validation: ✓ Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char
verified_features.success_page: ✓ Shows success message with login link

bug_fixed.issue: data.get('token', '').strip() failed when token was explicitly None
